name: fixinventory-plugin-digitalocean

documentation:
# fix-plugin-digitalocean
DigitalOcean Collector Plugin for Fix

## License
See [LICENSE](../../LICENSE) for details.

functions.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.utils.get_result_data
documentation:
Returns data from a DO API call result dict.

Args:
    result: Dict containing the result
    value: Either directly the name of a key found in result or
        a callable like a lambda that finds the relevant data withing
        result.

methods.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.DigitalOceanCollectorPlugin.collect
documentation:
This method is being called by fix whenever the collector runs

It is responsible for querying the cloud APIs for remote resources and adding
them to the plugin graph.
The graph root (self.graph.root) must always be followed by one or more
accounts. An account must always be followed by a region.
A region can contain arbitrary resources.

classes.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.resources.DigitalOceanResource

methods.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.resources.DigitalOceanResource.tag_resource_name
documentation:
Resource name in case tagging is supported by digitalocean.
Not all resources support tagging.

methods.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.resources.DigitalOceanResource.delete
documentation: Delete a resource in the cloud

A class that implements the abstract method delete() as well as update_tag()
and delete_tag().

delete() must be implemented. update_tag() and delete_tag() are optional.

classes.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.resources.DigitalOceanDroplet
documentation:
A DigitalOcean Droplet Resource

Droplet have a class variable `instance_status_map` which contains
a mapping from the droplet status string the cloud API returns
to our internal InstanceStatus state.

classes.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.resources.DigitalOceanDropletNeighborhood
documentation:
A DigitalOcean Droplet Neighborhood Resource

Represents a physical hardware server where droplets can be placed.

classes.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.resources.DigitalOceanVPC
documentation:
DigitalOcean network

This is what instances and other networking related resources might reside in.

methods.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.resources.DigitalOceanContainerRegistry.delete
documentation: Delete the container registry from the cloud

classes.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.collector.DigitalOceanTeamCollector

methods.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.collector.DigitalOceanTeamCollector.collect
documentation:
Runs the actual resource collection across all resource collectors.

Resource collectors add their resources to the local `self.graph` graph.

methods.name: fix_plugin_digitalocean.collector.DigitalOceanTeamCollector.default_attributes
documentation: See a similar method in the GCPCollectorPlugin

Collects a single DigitalOcean team

Responsible for collecting all the resources of an individual team.
Builds up its own local graph which is then taken by collect_project()
and merged with the plugin graph.

This way we can have many instances of DigitalOceanCollectorPlugin running in parallel.
All building up indivetual graphs which in the end are merged to a final graph containing
all DigitalOcean resources
